data.title: Encryption at Rest and in Transit
data.description: Data is protected using encryption while stored and during transmission.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2 for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: Continual monitoring for unusual behaviors and potential threats.
data.technical_spec: AWS GuardDuty for intelligent threat detection and monitoring.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust protection against distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield Advanced for real-time monitoring and automatic attack mitigation.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Strict user access control policies to ensure secure resource access.
data.technical_spec: AWS IAM for creating and managing users and access controls.

data.title: Security Compliance
data.description: Adheres to industry security standards and benchmarks.
data.technical_spec: Compliance with ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, CCPA.
